description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Cloudflare Workers KV is a global, low-latency key-value data store. The KV API allows developers to create namespaces, write and read key-value pairs, list keys, perform bulk operations with support for up to 10,000 key-value pairs per request, and manage key metadata.
